title: Spanish Paella with Pisto
description: A classic Spanish dish featuring saffron-infused rice, savory paella, and a flavorful pisto salsa.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced green bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Spanish paella rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for an additional minute.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the paella to a serving dish and top with gooey mozzarella cheese.
Drizzle with pisto salsa and serve immediately.
